scene: Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the channel style, drawn to fill the tall frame. A round-headed stick-figure man at a movie-theater concession counter holding a giant tub of popcorn, a price display showing a big number, the counter looming in front of him. Quiet, slightly off. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the channel style, drawn to fill the tall frame. The same man walking away grinning, happily clutching the huge popcorn tub, pleased with himself, totally unaware. Selective color: golden popcorn. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the channel style, drawn to fill the tall frame. Pulled back to the whole theater lobby: a giant glowing concession stand dominating the center, the man tiny, the carpet and layout funneling everyone toward the snacks. The building as a machine built around the popcorn. No text.

Crude black-marker hand-drawn doodle, full 9:16 vertical composition, clean white background, black linework with selective pop color, matching the channel style, drawn to fill the tall frame. The man walking past a small, dim movie screen toward the huge bright concession stand, the screen an afterthought in the background. The movie is the bait, the popcorn is the point. No text.
